title: National Day of Remembrance Act
description: National Day of Remembrance Act (National Day of Remembrance Act). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the National Day of Remembrance Act .

provisions.title: National Day of Remembrance
provisions.content: 2 Throughout Canada, in each and every year, the 6th day of December shall be known under the name of "National Day of Remembrance and Action on Violence Against Women".
